name: Pipeline CRM
highlight_text: Best for: Agencies looking for straightforward sales tracking
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__Source: Pipeline CRM

What Pipeline CRM Does

Pipeline CRM (also known as PipelineDeals) is a no-fuss CRM built on simplicity and usability. Agencies that want a deal tracking tool that works from day one, without too much customization, often lean here. The Pipeline team declares the software to be a “CRM for salespeople, built by salespeople”.

Key Features

  • One or more customizable pipelines
  • Email sync & history
  • Daily agenda & reminders
  • Activity timeline per deal
  • Basic reporting dashboards
  • Mobile app

Pricing

  • Start: $25/user/month
  • Develop: $33/user/month
  • Grow: $49/user/month
  • Custom enterprise pricing is also available

Pros

✅ Straightforward, clean interface with an easy learning curve
✅ Transparent, simple pricing
✅ Great customer management and workflows for small to medium teams who don’t need advanced workflows.

Cons

🚫 Automation & multi-pipeline functions are limited in low tiers and complex to set up
🚫 Reporting depth is less than other enterprise tools
🚫 Limited third-party integrations and APIs

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“It helps us reach more people with mass campaigns, and at the same time, we can send quick one-to-one emails right after a call using templates. This way, we can follow the 3M strategy faster and more easily.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
